controlled_motion_instruction: Continuous figure-eight motion at a comfortable steady pace without lifting the mouse.

controlled_variables.selected_device_policy: operator moves only SIGNO; select most active native raw device

freshness_rule: All run IDs, trace IDs, and repetition artifacts must be new and must not occur in Pilot v3 or rejected Confirmation v3.
approval_basis: Candidate v2 was calculated exclusively from Pilot v3 using a predeclared family-wise prediction method before Confirmation v4 capture.
